Decent enough for a quick business trip. Room was tidy, bathroom was fine — the cleanliness was what you'd expect at this price. We used the pool and gym a couple times, solid amenities overall. Front desk handled check-in smoothly and the concierge gave useful tips, so the service was competent if not memorable.

Spent a long weekend here with friends. Honestly the cleanliness was satisfactory — fresh linens, bathroom stocked, no complaints there. The amenities were a nice surprise actually, heated pool and a cute on-site cafe we hit every morning. Service-wise, everyone was polite but nobody really stood out. Fine stay.

We picked this hotel for the location and it delivered on that front. Housekeeping kept our room in good shape so the cleanliness was reliable. The amenities were adequate — gym had enough equipment, pool was well-heated, restaurant served a fair breakfast. Nothing special about the service but nothing to complain about either.

Three nights here for a family visit. Room was clean and the bathroom was presentable though the grout could use a refresh — the cleanliness passed muster. Loved that the amenities included a hot tub and a decent fitness center. The service was friendly at check-in but kind of invisible after that, which was honestly fine by us.

Not bad, not great, just... fine? The cleanliness was about what you'd expect — tidy room, clean towels, nothing exceptional. Amenities covered the basics with a working pool, small gym, and a business center that got the job done. Concierge was helpful and the service was polite throughout. Perfectly adequate.

Came here for a Tuesday-night work stopover. Room 512 was neat and the bathroom was acceptably maintained — the cleanliness was standard. WiFi worked and the pool was clean, so the amenities served their purpose. Derek at the front desk was efficient and the service was courteous. Would stay again for the price.

Here for our nephew's graduation weekend. Room was well-kept with daily housekeeping, so the cleanliness was good. The amenities were mixed — nice pool area but dated gym and limited dining options. Middle-of-the-road service; the front desk was helpful but we waited a while for room service. Can't complain too loudly though.

It does what it says on the tin. Housekeeping came daily and the cleanliness was consistent throughout our stay. Functional fitness center, clean spa, restaurant that served reliable if unremarkable food — the amenities were fine. Professional service and smooth check-in. Nothing to write home about but nothing to criticize.

Stayed here as a base for exploring the city. The cleanliness was acceptable — room was tidy, hallways vacuumed, lobby looked sharp. Pleasant surprise with the pool area and a gym that had modern equipment, so the amenities were better than expected. Service was a notch below with a slow front desk, but not a dealbreaker.

Quiet hotel, good location, fair rate. The cleanliness met the standard you'd want — no issues with housekeeping or bathroom upkeep. Pool was well-maintained, gym was adequate, gift shop had a decent selection — the amenities were sufficient. Competent service from the staff. Nothing memorable, nothing wrong.

Totally fine for what it is. Room was clean with fresh linens, bathroom well-stocked. The cleanliness was respectable throughout. Good pool and a small but well-equipped gym kept us active — the amenities were solid. Steady service with polite staff. We'd stay again without hesitation.

Girls' trip base camp for three nights. The cleanliness was good — our room was spotless and the common areas looked great. Amenities were a pleasant surprise, especially the rooftop pool. Service was friendly though a bit slow at the front desk during busy mornings. Overall a perfectly fine hotel.

Dependable, consistent, unremarkable — that about sums it up. The cleanliness was on point with daily housekeeping that never missed a day. Warm pool, basic gym, restaurant with daily specials that were hit or miss — the amenities served us well. Approachable service where staff answered questions willingly but didn't anticipate needs.

Solo trip, four nights. Room was clean, floors swept, bathroom fresh — the cleanliness was perfectly fine. Nice fitness center and a popular pool — the amenities covered what I needed. Courteous service at the front desk and responsive when I needed extra pillows. A solid mid-range pick.

Got what we paid for, which is all you can ask sometimes. The cleanliness was passable — bed made, floors clean, bathroom stocked. Decent pool and a gym with basic equipment — the amenities worked for our short stay. Adequate service from the front desk, responsive when we made requests.

Nothing fancy but it worked. Tidy room, functional bathroom, consistent housekeeping — the cleanliness was perfectly standard. Reasonable pool, okay gym, passable business center — the amenities covered the basics. Warm enough service with a concierge who had decent restaurant tips. A reliable stay.

Good room, surprisingly nice pool. The cleanliness was above average — our room gleamed after housekeeping visited. Modern gym equipment and a well-heated pool made the amenities the real highlight. Restaurant was the weak link with limited options, but we managed fine.

Impressed by how clean everything was, genuinely. Room was pristine, common areas spotless — the cleanliness exceeded expectations for this price point. Warm welcome at check-in and a concierge who arranged a great dinner reservation — the service was the real standout. Would come back just for how we were treated.

Here for the facilities and they delivered. Rooftop pool was stunning, fitness center was the best I've seen at this rate, spa was relaxing — the amenities were the real draw. Cleanliness was nothing special but the facilities made up for it. We came for the pool and left satisfied.

Room was well-maintained and staff were attentive without hovering — the cleanliness and service were both solid. Front desk resolved a billing issue fast and housekeeping respected our schedule. Reliable stay overall.

Beautiful pool, great gym, restaurant with a nice wine list — the amenities were the standout here. Attentive poolside service and a bartender who remembered our drinks by night two — the service complemented the facilities well. Wish the room had been a bit fresher but not a big deal.

Pool was clean and the gym was adequate, decent on-site restaurant for breakfast. The amenities were solid if unspectacular. Friendly front desk and efficient check-in made the service a pleasant part of our stay. Fine experience, no complaints.

Came for our anniversary and the cleanliness was nice — tidy room, inviting pool area, well-kept gym. The amenities were better than we expected for a three-star. Breakfast was reliable each morning. Comfortable stay, nothing remarkable but nothing disappointing.

Pool and hot tub were the highlights, used them every night. Good gym too. The amenities really made this hotel worth the rate. Professional front desk and smooth late checkout process — the service was easy and hassle-free. On-site cafe was a convenient bonus.

Immaculate room, sparkling bathroom, hallways always freshly vacuumed. The cleanliness was the best part of our stay by far. Didn't use many facilities but the room itself was a pleasant surprise. Would return just for the housekeeping.

Our room was refreshed beautifully each day and the bathroom was consistently spotless — the cleanliness stood out in a positive way. Clear this hotel invests in its housekeeping team. The effort shows in every detail.

Housekeeping was above average and the linens were always fresh. The cleanliness was genuinely impressive for what we paid. Bathroom well-stocked, room dust-free. A well-maintained property at its core.

Came for the pool and stayed for the gym — the amenities really defined our experience. Spa was rejuvenating and the restaurant had an interesting rotating menu. Spent most of our downtime using the hotel's facilities and they were all well-maintained.

Business center was a lifesaver when I needed to print boarding passes. Good pool, well-equipped gym, restaurant with varied options. The amenities kept us entertained and comfortable throughout. Would recommend for the facilities alone.

Pool was lovely, fitness center was modern, on-site dining was surprisingly varied. The amenities covered all our needs and then some. We spent evenings at the hotel bar and found it to be a pleasant spot. Solid facilities overall.

What kept us coming back to the lobby bar every evening was the bartender — genuinely friendly, great recommendations. Front desk remembered our room number, doorman always had a cab ready. The service was what made this hotel worth visiting. The people here are the real asset.

Every staff member we met was approachable and helpful. Concierge planned a wonderful day trip, front desk stored our luggage with a smile after checkout. The service was the highlight and the reason we'd consider returning. Personal touches matter.

Front desk team was warm and attentive, housekeeping responsive to every request. The service stood out in a hotel that was otherwise average. Night manager went above and beyond when our plans changed last minute. The cleanliness was also solid, which we appreciated.
Perfectly adequate stay, no complaints. Clean room, working facilities, polite staff. Won't make our best-of list but wasn't a disappointment. Good for a night or two.
Solidly middle of the road. Comfortable room, convenient location, met expectations. No surprises good or bad. Sometimes that's all you need.
Reliable hotel, did what it promised. Comfortable bed, functional bathroom, calm vibe. Served its purpose for a work trip. Would book again if in the area.
This hotel just works. Comfortable bed, clean-enough room, quiet floors. Sometimes that's all you need and this place delivered it consistently. No drama.

Better than expected for a three-star. Pool surprised us with its size, gym was well-ventilated. The cleanliness was above average and the amenities exceeded expectations. Staff were polite but forgettable.

Genuinely warm staff elevated an otherwise ordinary hotel. The cleanliness was satisfactory and the service was really quite special — they learned our names, the concierge shared local secrets. Made the stay feel personal.
Pool staff were attentive, restaurant waiters were cheerful, gym was always ready to go — the amenities and service worked well together. Room was basic but the facilities and people made up for it.
